name: Aqua Bio Technology
longBusinessSummary: Aqua Bio Technology ASA engages in the manufacture and sale of ingredients for cosmetic industry in Norway. The company offers Aquabeautine XL, a proprietary ingredient for skincare products; and Spirulysat, an antioxidant and vitamin-boosted spirulina for cosmetic use. The company distributes its products through internet, stores, and skincare clinics. Aqua Bio Technology ASA was founded in 2000 and is based in Oslo, Norway.
